_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Braves 3, Red Sox 2 (10 innings): Yastrzemski walk-off single sinks Boston
items.snark: Yastrzemski channeling his grandfather's name but none of the clutch against Boston, walk-off nightmare.

items.headline: Red Sox vs Braves tonight: 18-24 Sox try to keep bats hot in Atlanta
items.snark: Sox are 17-23 and the offense still couldn't score in a batting cage with a pitching machine.

items.headline: Patriots 2026 schedule: 8 winners and losers from brutal slate and primetime load
items.snark: Will Campbell gets revenge shot at Seattle, Mike Vrabel gets zero rhythmic schedule and a meme tour.

items.headline: Patriots add to scouting staff following Nancy Meier's retirement from front office
items.snark: Meier retires and Pats shuffle scouts, front office turnover feels like musical chairs with fewer chairs.
